system.description: This line of child’s dolls features a fully customizable appearance and outfit. When activated by spending one Quality Assurance from any Quality, the doll will participate in any conversation directed at it with a personality corresponding to that Quality. In addition, you may spend a second Quality Assurance from Professionalism when activating the doll to imbue it with your own speaking voice, mannerisms, and memories. This effect lasts for up to 8 hours.
